headline: Big Arch Burger Launch Tests McDonald's Premium Pricing And Investor Expectations
summary: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) has introduced the Big Arch Burger, its largest burger to date, across US locations. The nationwide rollout is drawing heavy media attention and viral social media reactions, with mixed consumer reviews on taste, size, and value. The new item features different ingredients and preparation methods compared with McDonald's core burgers, positioning it as a flagship offering in the premium burger category. For investors watching NYSE:MCD, the Big Arch Burger launch...

headline: The 13-Second Video That Supercharged the McDonald’s-Burger King Rivalry
summary: It took only a few words mumbled with a mouthful of burger for  Tom Curtis  to strike a blow against his biggest competitor.  “Only one thing missing,” the Burger King president said, wiping at his mouth with his hand after chomping into one of the chain’s Whoppers.  Curtis’ video clip, posted to Burger King’s social media channels this week, runs about 13 seconds.

headline: McDonald’s to invest €150m in Ireland to open 25 new outlets
summary: The restaurant brand intends to add five outlets annually over a five-year period.
